seoTitle: Amaroo vs Amosfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Amaroo and Amosfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Amaroo and Amosfield.
heading: Amaroo vs Amosfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Amaroo, New South Wales and Amosfield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Amosfield has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Amaroo (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Amaroo or Amosfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Amaroo has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Amosfield scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Amaroo scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Amosfield scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Amaroo or Amosfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Amosfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
